titles.title: I stand in awe of You

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You are beautiful beyond description Too marvelous for words Too wonderful for comprehension Like nothing ever seen or heard

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Who can grasp Your infinite wisdom Who can fathom the depths of Your love You are beautiful beyond description Majesty, enthroned above

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: And I stand, I stand in awe of You I stand, I stand in awe of You Holy God to whom all praise is due I stand in awe of You

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You are beautiful beyond description Yet God crushed You for my sin In agony and deep affliction Cut off that I might enter in

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Who can grasp such tender compassion? Who can fathom this mercy so free? You are beautiful beyond description Lamb of God who died for me

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: And I stand, I stand in awe of You I stand, I stand in awe of You Holy God to whom all praise is due I stand in awe of You
